title: Browne, Anthony - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State, Department for Transport - ACOBA Advice
body: "Mr Browne left his role at the Department for Transport in July 2024  Independent Consultancy, operating as Grand Strategy  Mr Browne sought the Committee’s advice about setting up an independent consultancy. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed was sent in October 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter can be found here..  "
